name: project
description: Per-project atlas + structure + Kanban board with hierarchical tasks (task hub + notes + task-board + folder-style sub-task cards), workstream-tagged cards, and All-Projects hub. v1.0.0 BREAKING: replaces v0.3.0 projects-legacy stopgap; module_directory 'projects-legacy' → 'projects'; drops slash-command surface in favor of New Project nav-button on the Projects.md hub; pre_install[delete] retires legacy boards/To-Do-Board.md.

post_install.message: Project blueprint v1.0.0 installed at beacon/projects/. To create your first project: open beacon/projects/Projects.md (Cmd+O → search 'Projects') and click the 'New Project' action button. Per-project Kanban cards auto-promote to folder-style (tasks/<X>/<X>.md and board/<Y>/<Y>.md) via Templater. Workstream tagging on cards via the Change/Assign widget rendered on each card. Cmd+R required after this install to load the 3 CustomJS classes.
